title: 20th Anniversary Gala
summary: The Forest Avenue Business Improvement District commemorated its 20th Anniversary with an evening of reflection, celebration, and gratitude.
body:
The Forest Avenue Business Improvement District commemorated its 20th Anniversary Gala with an evening of reflection, celebration, and gratitude on Thursday, March 21st, 2024. Hosted at one of the corridor's longest-standing establishments, LiGreci's Staaten, the event honored the rich history and unwavering commitment of local businesses and community members.

The success of the gala was made possible through the generous support of sponsors. Their contributions helped ensure a memorable evening of celebration and recognition.
